title: Loyalty
description: A vanilla+ modpack that builds upon the base game.
body:
Loyalty Edition is a vanilla plus modpack that aims to build upon the base game while staying loyal to the feel of the base game. Feel free to leave any suggestion or feedback on the youtube trailer or in the comments.

![https://mmcreviews.com/all/modpacks/loyalty/](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8f923376992db912ddde3491cc5d043e02a56cb8.webp)

[Leave a review here](https://mmcreviews.com/all/modpacks/loyalty/)

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/HSMtiQqpTEo" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>


![feature list](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/09ebf2ab157f166c426b9ab193e2d8cd9c16ce3f.png)



### **Notes**

- I would highly recommend allocating atleast 4gb of ram otherwise it may be a slower experiance depending on your system.
- Some mods from v2.0 have not been updated some of them will be added later on
- loyalty Edition 1.0 is considered the 3.0 version of the pack however moving foward versions will continue up from 1.0.



Credits: [vanilla tweaks](https://vanillatweaks.net/)
